title: [App] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from headset
scenario: Unpairing charge case from headset via Clear Trusted Device list in Device Settings shows headset as standalone without charge case after reconnection
steps: Precondition: Headset is paired with the Poly Studio Mobile app and paired with the charge case.
1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → Reset Device.
3. Tap "Clear" next to the Clear Trusted Device list.
4. Remove the device from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Remove the device from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
6. Reconnect the headset to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: 1. After step 3, the app shows the device as disconnected. 2. After steps 4-5, the device is properly removed from the app and phone. 3. After step 6, the device connects properly and is displayed as standalone (headset only, without the charge case).
